description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to segment the website 'https://books.toscrape.com/' into three categories: 'Travel' (URLs containing 'travel_2'), 'Mystery' (URLs containing 'mystery_3'), and 'Poetry' (URLs containing 'poetry_23'). Perform a crawl and export the internal HTML results to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/segmented_crawl.csv'. Additionally, generate a summary report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/segment_counts.txt' documenting the total page counts for each of the three segments.
